findings.description: `submitLinkDisabledJsp` is a specific property name mentioned in the source (both in the table footnote and as a cross-reference target within `WebView_CustomTagConfig`) and is also reproduced verbatim in the s7 section body, but it is absent from s7's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source footnote [#]: "`submitLinkDisabledJsp`の項を参照" — referenced as a named configuration property of WebView_CustomTagConfig for customizing disabled-link rendering.
